scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.doctor: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const checks=[['node -v','Node'],['npm -v','NPM'],['npm ls --workspaces --depth=0','Workspaces']]; for (const [cmd,label] of checks) { console.log(`\n## ${label}`); execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'}); }"
